event: Stone bridge at Labastide du Vert
description: A sunlit stone bridge with three arches spans a calm river, its form reflected in the dark water below. Behind the bridge, village houses with red-tiled roofs nestle among tall, slender green cypress and poplar trees. The scene is richly textured with dappled light and vibrant greens, golds, and warm earth tones. A hillside rises behind the village.

_meta.title: The Bridge at Labastide du Vert
